items.summary: In the homepage hero section (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx), apply the uploaded Bodyshape Fitness 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) as the full background covering the entire hero section, modifying CSS to ensure the image fills the background area completely with appropriate sizing (cover/contain) and positioning (center)
